The error getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN indicate: The error getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN indicates a DNS lookup error. EAI_AGAIN suggests a failure in name resolution, meaning the DNS server could not process the request at that moment. Check the host name and try again.
A PostgreSQL extension is registered on: A PostgreSQL extension is registered on the server but its underlying shared library file is missing from $libdir. This usually happens after a Postgres major version upgrade, switching to a container image that does not include the extension, or if the extension package was uninstalled. Reinstall the extension package on the server and run ALTER EXTENSION <name> UPDATE, or drop and recreate the extension. This is a server-side configuration issue.
